untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental data (Price-to-Book < 1.2 percentile, Price-to-Earnings < 20th percentile, 3-year return ranking, earnings calendar dates) which are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The allowed indicators are price action and technical indicators only. Fundamental ratios, percentile rankings, and earnings event calendars cannot be expressed with the provided technical indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally dependent on multi-factor value screening and earnings event timing. Only volume expansion (vol_ratio_20 > 1.0) could be partially captured as a proxy for the earnings information release window. The core logic requires external data feeds for P/B ratio, P/E ratio, historical return rankings, and earnings calendar integration that fall outside the scope of technical indicators.
